case_title: DAVID GOMBERG et al VS. CITIBANK, N.A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GOMBERG, DAVID LUM, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMBERG, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $460.00, THE CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DIANA LUM HAVING BEEN SETTLED BY THE PARTIES, PLAINTIFF DIANA LUM IS DISMISSED AS A PARTY OF THIS ACTION. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS A DECISION ON THE CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DAVID GOMBERG ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED BY CITIBANK, FILED. ONE IS ALREADY ON FILE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2009 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DIANA LUM BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-30-2009 AT 3:30PM.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SMALL CLAIMS HEARING HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMBERG, DAVID LUM, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED ON FEBRUARY 23, 2009.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-22-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 20, 2009 AT 8:30 AM FOR PROGRESS REPORT RE: CLAIM OF OF PLAINTIFF DIANA LUM. IF NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF DIANA LUM OR DEFENDANT, CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PLAINTIFF DIANA LUM WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DAVID GOMBERG IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK; S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
